positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon embracing a cluster of stylized celestial flora and glowing stars. The style should be modern abstract botanical, rendered with thick, solid line work and clean, bold negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, muted gold, and creamy off-white. The composition should be perfectly centered, creating a strong, positive silhouette against a contrasting background. Highly detailed outlines, suitable for screen printing on apparel, vector art style, symmetrical balance, ethereal glow emanating from the flowers.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, ugly, disfigured, signature, extra limbs
